title: atragene speciosa var. saxatilis
intro: Atragene speciosa var. saxatilis, commonly known as the Rock Gentian, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Rock Gentian include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Rock Gentian include infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote digestion, ease coughs, and support the immune system.
